content_en:
' Recorded by ibn Khuzaimah in al-Taubeed (#208). See the complete discussion of is chains in Silsilat al-Ahaadeeth al-Sabeebah, vol. 2, p. 115, #951, by Shaikh -Albaani. Recorded by al-Bukhari (#6490), Book on Heart-Softening Hadith, Chapter to look to one who has less than you; Muslim (#2963), Book on Abstaining from this World, and the wording is his.

The Figh of Marriage

There are some rights in which both spouses share and which become obligatory due to a sound marriage contract. These include the following:

(1) Having the Right to Enjoy One Another

If the marriage is performed between the two spouses and the proper conditions of having the wife go to her husband and his ensuring that he will provide her housing and maintenance are met, and there are no preventive factors such as them being in the state of pilgrimage, it is allowed for the spouses to enjoy each other [physically] in the ways allowed by Islamic law. This, in fact, is one of the purposes of marriage. Allah says in the Quran,

“It is permissible for you to have sexual intercourse with your wives during the nights of [days of] fasting. They are clothing for you and you are clothing for them” (al-Bagarah 187). The wife is a source of repose and comfort for her husband and he is the same for her. Allah says, Clee eeg ) tre ye Ok ow Ae oe ere % ae Sey GB PKd Ely il Saal So SS GS OF UT Gy

“And of His signs is that He created for you mates from among yourselves that you may find tranquillity in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy” (al-Room 21).

‘The Figh of Marriage

(2) Establishing the Rights of Inheritance between the Spouses

If a proper marriage contract is completed and then one of the spouses dies before his or her spouse [while they were still married], the right of inheritance is established between them, as long as there are no legal factors to prevent such inheritance. Allah says in the Quran,

ig ih 5 bp 2 ai 4 a, 54 pS SO My GBI 3A Oy rg te

gi GO sed Loy why 5s Ue “And for you is half of what your wives leave if they have no child. But if they have a child, for you is one fourth of what they leave, after any bequest they have made or debt. And for them is one fourth if you leave no child. But if you leave a child, then for them is an eighth of what you leave, after any bequest you made or debt” (al-Nisaa 12).

(3) Treating Each Other in a Good and Kind Manner

This was discussed previously.

(4) Establishing the Forbiddance of Marriage to Relatives

It is forbidden for the husband to ever marry the mother of his wife, no matter how far back one goes [such as the grandmother, great grandmother and so on]. Similarly, he cannot marry her daughter [no matter how far down one goes, such as the granddaughter and so forth]. It is also forbidden for him to be married to both his wife and at the same time be married to her sister, paternal aunt, maternal aunt or niece no matter how far removed. Similarly, it is forbidden for the woman to

‘The Figh of Marriage

marry her husband’s father or son, no matter how far one goes in the lineage.

These are some of the rights of the spouses and some of their mutual rights presented in a general fashion. It was not the purpose to present all of their rights but it was simply intended to state their different types and the founding principles. What we have mentioned indicate those that we did not mention.

Whatever is correct in any of the above is from the One, the Bountiful. Whatever is incorrect is from my own soul and from Satan, and Allah and His Messenger are free and innocent of it.

Allah is the One to ask to make what I have written beneficial for me, my parents and the Muslims as a whole. He is also asked to make my scale heavier due to it on the Day of Resurrection. He, perfect and exalted be He, is the best to ask and the most generous to put one’s hopes in. And may the peace and blessings of Allah be upon the servant of Allah and His Messenger, our Prophet Muhammad, and upon all his family and Companions.

‘The Figh of Marriage

content_id:
Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Khuzaimah dalam al-Tauhid (#208). Lihat pembahasan lengkap mengenai sanadnya dalam Silsilat al-Ahaadits al-Shahihah, jilid 2, hal. 115, #951, oleh Syaikh al-Albani. Diriwayatkan oleh al-Bukhari (#6490), Kitab Hadits-Hadits yang Melembutkan Hati, Bab melihat kepada orang yang lebih rendah darimu; Muslim (#2963), Kitab Zuhud dari Dunia, dan redaksi tersebut adalah miliknya.

Fiqh Pernikahan

Terdapat beberapa hak yang dimiliki bersama oleh kedua pasangan dan yang menjadi wajib karena akad nikah yang sah. Ini mencakup hal-hal berikut:

(1) Hak untuk Menikmati Satu Sama Lain

Apabila pernikahan telah dilangsungkan antara kedua pasangan dan syarat-syarat yang semestinya telah terpenuhi, yaitu istri pergi kepada suaminya dan suami memastikan bahwa ia akan menyediakan tempat tinggal dan nafkah baginya, serta tidak ada faktor penghalang seperti keduanya sedang dalam keadaan ihram haji, maka diperbolehkan bagi pasangan suami istri untuk menikmati satu sama lain [secara fisik] dengan cara-cara yang diperbolehkan oleh syariat Islam. Ini, sesungguhnya, adalah salah satu tujuan pernikahan. Allah berfirman dalam Quran,

"Dihalalkan bagi kamu pada malam hari bulan puasa bercampur dengan istri-istri kamu. Mereka adalah pakaian bagimu dan kamu adalah pakaian bagi mereka" (al-Baqarah: 187). Istri adalah sumber ketenangan dan kenyamanan bagi suaminya dan ia pun demikian baginya. Allah berfirman, Clee eeg ) tre ye Ok ow Ae oe ere % ae Sey GB PKd Ely il Saal So SS GS OF UT Gy

"Dan di antara tanda-tanda kekuasaan-Nya ialah Dia menciptakan untukmu pasangan-pasangan dari jenismu sendiri, supaya kamu cenderung dan merasa tenteram kepadanya, dan dijadikan-Nya di antaramu rasa kasih dan sayang" (al-Rum: 21).

Fiqh Pernikahan

(2) Menetapkan Hak Waris antara Pasangan Suami Istri

Apabila akad nikah yang sah telah selesai dilaksanakan kemudian salah satu dari pasangan meninggal dunia sebelum pasangannya [sementara mereka masih dalam ikatan pernikahan], hak waris ditetapkan di antara keduanya, selama tidak ada faktor hukum yang menghalangi pewarisan tersebut. Allah berfirman dalam Quran,

ig ih 5 bp 2 ai 4 a, 54 pS SO My GBI 3A Oy rg te

gi GO sed Loy why 5s Ue "Dan bagimu (para suami) seperdua dari harta yang ditinggalkan oleh istri-istrimu, jika mereka tidak mempunyai anak. Jika istri-istrimu itu mempunyai anak, maka kamu mendapat seperempat dari harta yang ditinggalkannya sesudah dipenuhi wasiat yang mereka buat atau (dan) sesudah dibayar hutangnya. Para istri memperoleh seperempat harta yang kamu tinggalkan jika kamu tidak mempunyai anak. Jika kamu mempunyai anak, maka para istri memperoleh seperdelapan dari harta yang kamu tinggalkan sesudah dipenuhi wasiat yang kamu buat atau (dan) sesudah dibayar hutang-hutangmu" (al-Nisaa: 12).

(3) Saling Memperlakukan dengan Cara yang Baik dan Penuh Kebaikan

Hal ini telah dibahas sebelumnya.

(4) Menetapkan Larangan Menikahi Kerabat

Diharamkan bagi suami untuk selamanya menikahi ibu dari istrinya, tidak peduli seberapa jauh garis keturunannya [seperti nenek, buyut, dan seterusnya]. Demikian pula, ia tidak dapat menikahi putri istrinya [tidak peduli seberapa jauh ke bawah garis keturunannya, seperti cucu perempuan dan seterusnya]. Diharamkan pula baginya untuk menikahi sekaligus istrinya dan pada saat yang sama menikahi saudara perempuan istrinya, bibi dari pihak ayah, bibi dari pihak ibu, atau keponakan perempuan tidak peduli seberapa jauh hubungannya. Demikian pula, diharamkan bagi perempuan untuk

Fiqh Pernikahan

menikahi ayah atau anak laki-laki suaminya, tidak peduli seberapa jauh garis keturunannya.

Inilah beberapa hak pasangan suami istri dan beberapa hak bersama mereka yang disajikan secara umum. Tidak dimaksudkan untuk memaparkan semua hak-hak mereka, melainkan sekadar untuk menyatakan berbagai jenisnya dan prinsip-prinsip dasarnya. Apa yang telah kami sebutkan menunjukkan apa yang tidak kami sebutkan.

Apa pun yang benar dari semua hal di atas adalah dari Yang Maha Esa lagi Maha Pemurah. Apa pun yang salah berasal dari jiwa saya sendiri dan dari setan, dan Allah serta Rasul-Nya terbebas dan terlepas darinya.

Allah-lah yang dimohon untuk menjadikan apa yang telah saya tulis bermanfaat bagi saya, kedua orang tua saya, dan kaum Muslimin secara keseluruhan. Ia juga dimohon untuk memberatkan timbangan amal saya karenanya pada Hari Kiamat. Dia, Maha Sempurna dan Maha Tinggi, adalah sebaik-baik tempat memohon dan yang paling dermawan untuk digantungkan harapan. Semoga shalawat dan salam Allah tercurah kepada hamba Allah dan Rasul-Nya, Nabi kita Muhammad, beserta seluruh keluarga dan para Sahabatnya.

Fiqh Pernikahan

content_ar:
' Recorded by ibn Khuzaimah in al-Taubeed (#208). See the complete discussion of is chains in Silsilat al-Ahaadeeth al-Sabeebah, vol. 2, p. 115, #951, by Shaikh -Albaani. Recorded by al-Bukhari (#6490), Book on Heart-Softening الحديث, Chapter to look to one who has less than you; Muslim (#2963), Book on Abstaining from this World, and the wording is his.

The Figh of Marriage

There are some rights in which both spouses share and which become obligatory due to a sound marriage contract. These include the following:

(1) Having the Right to Enjoy One Another

If the marriage is performed between the two spouses and the proper conditions of having the wife go to her husband and his ensuring that he will provide her housing and maintenance are met, and there are no preventive factors such as them being in the state of pilgrimage, it is allowed for the spouses to enjoy each other [physically] in the ways allowed by Islamic law. This, in fact, is one of the purposes of marriage. الله says in the القرآن الكريم,

“It is permissible for you to have sexual intercourse with your wives during the nights of [days of] fasting. They are clothing for you and you are clothing for them” (al-Bagarah 187). The wife is a source of repose and comfort for her husband and he is the same for her. الله says, Clee eeg ) tre ye Ok ow Ae oe ere % ae Sey GB PKd Ely il Saal So SS GS OF UT Gy

“And of His signs is that He created for you mates from among yourselves that you may find tranquillity in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy” (al-Room 21).

‘The Figh of Marriage

(2) Establishing the Rights of Inheritance between the Spouses

If a proper marriage contract is completed and then one of the spouses dies before his or her spouse [while they were still married], the right of inheritance is established between them, as long as there are no legal factors to prevent such inheritance. الله says in the القرآن الكريم,

ig ih 5 bp 2 ai 4 a, 54 pS SO My GBI 3A Oy rg te

gi GO sed Loy why 5s Ue “And for you is half of what your wives leave if they have no child. But if they have a child, for you is one fourth of what they leave, after any bequest they have made or debt. And for them is one fourth if you leave no child. But if you leave a child, then for them is an eighth of what you leave, after any bequest you made or debt” (al-Nisaa 12).

(3) Treating Each Other in a Good and Kind Manner

This was discussed previously.

(4) Establishing the Forbiddance of Marriage to Relatives

It is forbidden for the husband to ever marry the mother of his wife, no matter how far back one goes [such as the grandmother, great grandmother and so on]. Similarly, he cannot marry her daughter [no matter how far down one goes, such as the granddaughter and so forth]. It is also forbidden for him to be married to both his wife and at the same time be married to her sister, paternal aunt, maternal aunt or niece no matter how far removed. Similarly, it is forbidden for the woman to

‘The Figh of Marriage

marry her husband’s father or son, no matter how far one goes in the lineage.

These are some of the rights of the spouses and some of their mutual rights presented in a general fashion. It was not the purpose to present all of their rights but it was simply intended to state their different types and the founding principles. What we have mentioned indicate those that we did not mention.

Whatever is correct in any of the above is from the One, the Bountiful. Whatever is incorrect is from my own soul and from Satan, and الله and His Messenger are free and innocent of it.

الله is the One to ask to make what I have written beneficial for me, my parents and the Muslims as a whole. He is also asked to make my scale heavier due to it on the Day of Resurrection. He, perfect and exalted be He, is the best to ask and the most generous to put one’s hopes in. And may the peace and blessings of الله be upon the servant of الله and His Messenger, our النبي محمد ﷺ, and upon all his family and الصحابة.
